visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens under a white event tent where a woman in a pink tracksuit stands centered. She has long dark hair and a bright smile, gesturing with her hands as she addresses the camera. Behind her, rows of tables are covered with white cloths, stacked with diverse products including snacks and boxes. The lighting is bright, consistent with an outdoor market setup. (2) As the video progresses, there is a fast-paced sequence of product close-ups. The woman is seen holding various items: a clear tote bag with colorful contents, a green-bordered festive bag, and heart-shaped wooden plaques. She handles a soft, patterned blanket, demonstrating its texture to the camera. The background remains the busy interior of the tent market with many shelves and bins. (3) The final segment focuses on the apparel and lifestyle section. The woman moves along racks of clothing, including flannels and t-shirts. She showcases electronic accessories like power banks and folds soft towels. The camera pans across long tables overflowing with packaged food items. The video concludes with a wide view of the market stalls, ending on a graphic inviting viewers to join.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: haha baby. [Slogan]: 2025 haha baby 擁抱點點路跑 RUN. [Subtitle]: 大家早安啊. [Variety]: 有夠早 (此時早上9:00). (2) [Subtitle]: 幫大家介紹一下. [Subtitle]: 週邊商品區有賣哪些東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 這邊呢 就是各式的手作包. [Subtitle]: 這邊都有樣品. [Subtitle]: 那看一看有需要的就話. [Subtitle]: 旁邊袋子沒有拆封的 就是實際要購買的. [Subtitle]: 結帳的話會幫你協助做檢查. (4) [Variety]: !HOT!!!. [Subtitle]: 保健食品區 就是賣的非常好的. [Subtitle]: 益生菌、酵素凍. [Subtitle]: 然後膠原蛋白 這些我們全部都有帶. (5) [Subtitle]: 那之前那個浴衣節 我們有做這個繪馬. [Variety]: 是愛心圖案的唷. [Subtitle]: 又把它弄了一些些. (6) [Variety]: 八路跑一定要聖誕節吧!!!. [Subtitle]: 福袋 那接下來聖誕節要到了. [Subtitle]: 如果你有交換禮物的需求 這種就滿適合的. [Subtitle]: 低卡懶人組. [Subtitle]: Q凍飲、哈米花、雞湯麵. (7) [Variety]: \也有春雨組合/. [Subtitle]: 還是要這個深夜春雨 都可以. [Slogan]: 重點商品 懶人毛毯. [Variety]: 大人原價999 我們路跑 優惠699而已. [Subtitle]: 賣完就沒了. (8) [Subtitle]: 首賣的蛋捲 我們有原味跟肉鬆一半一半. [Variety]: 送禮自用都可以. [Subtitle]: 要吃要送人都很適合. (9) [Subtitle]: 馬年 點點在騎馬. [Variety]: 可愛可愛!!. [Subtitle]: 有一種馬戲團的概念. (10) [Subtitle]: 手燈手錶我們還剩一些 所以我們就有搭配那個. [Subtitle]: 酒的組合 只要499. [Logo]: 禁止酒駕 未滿十八歲 禁止飲酒. [Slogan]: 十週年紀念啤酒. (11) [Subtitle]: 第二天下午有露天電影院 歡迎大家來看都不用錢. [Variety]: 躺起來很舒服. [Slogan]: 市集優惠 充氣沙發 $599 (原價$999). (12) [Subtitle]: 我們的原相肌組合旅行組 優惠價只要$3888. [Variety]: \路跑限定優惠/. [Variety]: (原價1380直接送!!!). [Subtitle]: 買一組 我們直接送你一瓶. (13) [Subtitle]: 擦臉擦身體擦哪裡都可以 當護手霜也很好用. [Subtitle]: 只有現場 只有這兩天 錯過就沒了. (14) [Subtitle]: 十週年酒的禮盒 四瓶酒 玻璃杯兩個 一組599. [Subtitle]: 繼續還有. [Variety]: 臺灣製造. [Slogan]: 市集優惠 發熱衣優惠 大人發熱衣三件$1680 兒童發熱衣三件$1330. (15) [Subtitle]: 非常的多 非常貼身 體感非常舒服. [Variety]: \跟十週年展的款式都不一樣喔/. [Subtitle]: 外套 然後路跑一系列 最新的那個套裝也有. (16) [Subtitle]: 手機沒電的話呢 這裡有賣行動電源. [Variety]: 兩種款式. [Subtitle]: 而且我們行動電源出廠的時候 請廠商幫我們充飽了 太貼心!!. (17) [Subtitle]: 兔絨毯 這一面都是純棉二重紗 小朋友、新生兒都OK的. [Variety]: 數量不多 賣完為止!!. [Subtitle]: 跑完步會有點需要. (18) [Subtitle]: 這邊棉質毛巾 浴巾這邊都有. [Variety]: 超級多!!!. [Subtitle]: 再來那邊全部 都是我們全系列的食品. [Subtitle]: 零食、調理包系列. (19) [Subtitle]: 這裡幾乎把我們全系列明星商品 我們全都帶了. [Subtitle]: 可以來看看喔. [Variety]: 一起來逛逛✨.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host/creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair, wearing a dusty pink hooded tracksuit (hoodie and shorts) with red-and-white patterned socks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large pop-up market inside a white tent. Tables are arranged in rows, draped with white cloths and stocked with various merchandise, packaged snacks, boxes, and clothing racks.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman's high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting '大家早安啊'. Her voice is bright and cheerful with high arousal. Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM starts simultaneously with a driving beat. A digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as the first variety text appears. (2) The woman continues speaking at a fast pace, introducing the market items. Each major visual transition is punctuated by a subtle 'whoosh' or 'sparkle' SFX. The BGM maintains a consistent 128 BPM energetic vibe. The mix is clear, with speech prioritized over the music. (3) During the showcasing of apparel, the woman's tone shifts slightly into a persuasive, commercial style. Another 'ding' SFX marks a specific discount price. The incidental noise of fabric rustling is briefly audible but very faint. The audio concludes with a final cheerful sign-off and the BGM fading into a rhythmic end card.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Showcase -> Special Offers -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the limited-edition merchandise available at the '2025 haha baby Run' pop-up market, using a high-energy vlog style to attract fans and shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host is explicitly showcasing and pricing brand-specific merchandise ('haha baby') and inviting viewers to the physical market location.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and colorful graphics typical of Taiwanese variety social media to maintain high engagement while advertising multiple product lines simultaneously.
